calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox appeared by zoom for David Bahl (proposed executor).

Mrs. Fox stated that the submission of two wills was done in error. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will that was submitted on February 22, 2023 and dated June 25, 2021 is admitted to probate. David Walter Bahl is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
